Reservation Policy

  • ◆Tables held for 15 minutes after booking time
  • ◆Cancellations accepted up to 24 hours in advance
  • ◆Groups of 8+ require a deposit
  • ◆Private dining available on request
  • ◆Smart casual dress code applies
